83 AB5F AB5F_NONE_ABOVE (AB5F) None of Above Residential History CHAR 1 Demographic information: residential history prior to entry - none of above 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown
84 AB6 AB6_LIFE_OCCUP (AB6) Lifetime Occupation CHAR 21 Demographic information: lifetime occupation(s).
85 AB7 AB7_EDUCATION (AB7) Education CHAR 1 Demographic information: education (highest level completed). 1 = No schooling, 2 = 8th
